targets.surface: MLOps platform with artifact repository. Attack vectors: Path traversal and RCE via model uploads (.pkl, .onnx) and artifact registry API.

targets.name: DB-GPT
targets.attack_surface: AI-native data app framework. Vulnerable endpoint: POST /api/v1/personal/agent/upload. Risks: Arbitrary file upload and path traversal.

targets.surface: Autonomous AI agent framework. Attack surface: Resource Manager handles file uploads for agents. Risks: RCE via malicious file uploads.
Low-code LLM flow builder. Attack surface: Document loader nodes (PDF, CSV). Risks: Path traversal in file storage and unauthenticated processing.
LLM observability platform. Attack surface: Dataset/Prompt export and import API. Risks: IDOR and SSRF in backend services.
